zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Grey於1149年出生在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可時，他的父親Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock19歲，母親Eva De Redvers16歲。他和Eleanor de Clare至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1185年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Grey was born in 1149, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock, was 19 and his mother, Eva De Redvers, was 16. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Eleanor de Clare. He died in 1185, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Grey est né en 1149, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Eva De Redvers, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Eleanor de Clare. Il est décédé en 1185, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Grey 1149 in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock 19 und seine Mutter Eva De Redvers 16. Er hatte mit Eleanor de Clare mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Grey è nato il nel 1149 nel Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Eva De Redvers, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Eleanor de Clare. Morì nel 1185, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Greyが1149年にイギリスイギリスエセックススウロックで生まれた時，父Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrockは19歳，母Eva De Redversは16歳であった。彼はEleanor de Clareとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1185年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Grey(이)가 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva De Redvers(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Eleanor de Clare(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Grey nasceu em 1149, em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Eva De Redvers, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Eleanor de Clare. Ele faleceu em 1185, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Grey родился в 1149 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva De Redvers, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Eleanor de Clare. Он умер в 1185 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Grey nació en 1149, en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Anchitel De Grey Of Thurrock, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Eva De Redvers, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Eleanor de Clare. Murió en 1185, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
